verification_invariants.chronological_ledger: Strictly sequential and deterministically sorted using ledger_sequence and parent-hash causality, independent of timestamp sorting.
verification_invariants.strict_ancestry: Proposal event is cryptographically and causally verified as an ancestor of the harvest event (proposal.ledger_sequence < harvest.ledger_sequence).
verification_invariants.still_alive: Unresolved questions and design frictions are purely explicit, with no extraction-based or heuristic fallbacks.
verification_invariants.explicit_abandonment: Sibling path abandonment is modeled as an append-only 'PATH_ABANDONED' human disposition event rather than an edited property of the version.
